name: LogoKit
tagline: Fetch brand, stock, and cryptocurrency logos
description: Retrieve logo images by company domain, stock exchange ticker, or cryptocurrency symbol, with configurable size and fallback behavior.

auth.hint: Create a LogoKit account, open the API Tokens section at https://logokit.com/account/api-tokens, and use the publishable Logo API token (prefixed pk_) as the token query parameter. It is designed to be safe for client-side use.

tools.name: get_logo_by_domain
tools.description: Retrieve a company logo image by its domain name.

params.name: domain
params.description: Company domain name, for example apple.com.

params.name: fallback
params.description: Fallback behavior when no logo is available: monogram, monogram-light, or 404.

tools.name: get_logo_by_stock_ticker
tools.description: Retrieve a company logo image by its stock exchange ticker symbol.

params.name: fallback
params.description: Fallback behavior when no logo is available: monogram, monogram-light, or 404.

tools.name: get_logo_by_crypto_symbol
tools.description: Retrieve a cryptocurrency logo image by its symbol.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Cryptocurrency symbol; over 12,000 cryptocurrencies are supported.

params.name: fallback
params.description: Fallback behavior when no logo is available: monogram, monogram-light, or 404.
